name: Westar
description_short: Westar Distribution is an automotive parts supplier specializing in suspension components, engine mounts, and drive shaft supports for the aftermarket repair industry.
description_long:
Westar Distribution was founded in 1986 by Hardeep Singh Chadha and Taranbir Kaur as a small automotive parts warehouse in Columbia, Maryland. Over nearly four decades, the company has grown from a 1,500 square-foot operation into a major distributor with two large distribution centers—a 187,000 square-foot facility in Columbia, MD and a 16,000 square-foot facility in Ontario, CA (previously Fullerton, CA). The company serves the automotive aftermarket industry by supplying repair shops and distributors with quality replacement parts.

Westar's product portfolio focuses on critical suspension and drivetrain components including engine and transmission mounts, strut mounts, drive shaft center supports, and air suspension systems. These are OEM-quality parts designed to meet original factory specifications for fit, form, and function across vehicles from 1942 to 2025. The company operates a B2B distribution model serving automotive repair shops, dealerships, and parts retailers through online ordering, quick-order systems, and dedicated sales representative agencies.

Westar distinguishes itself through vertical integration and scale—operating two major distribution centers on opposite coasts to serve national customers with competitive pricing and fast shipping. The company emphasizes quality assurance aligned with OEM standards and has maintained consistent ownership and leadership since inception, with current President & CEO Hardeep Chadha overseeing operations alongside a dedicated management team including VP of Sales Nick Behrendt.

However, this is fundamentally a B2B parts distributor, not a consumer finance company. Westar does not offer loans, credit products, financial services, or any payday-alternative services. The categorization as a "payday-alternative" is factually incorrect and represents a significant data error that should be corrected immediately.
services: Engine and transmission mounts wholesale distribution
Strut mounts for suspension system repairs
Online quick-order system for commercial customers
Sales representative agency network for regional account management
Parts cross-reference search by vehicle year, make, and model
Multiple distribution center fulfillment (East Coast and West Coast)
Bulk order processing for repair facilities
pros: Two geographically distributed distribution centers enable coast-to-coast rapid fulfillment and competitive shipping costs
Specializes exclusively in OEM-equivalent suspension and drivetrain components reducing compatibility issues
Nearly 40-year operating history with consistent ownership demonstrates stability and industry expertise
Supports vehicle models spanning 83 model years (1942-2025) enabling broad parts availability
Quick-order online system and dedicated sales rep network streamline procurement for commercial customers
Maintains significant inventory (187,000 sq ft facility) reducing backorder risks for repair shops
cons: This is a B2B wholesale distributor—not accessible to consumer individual buyers seeking personal transportation parts
No consumer-facing financing, credit products, or payment plans offered
Limited online transparency regarding pricing, inventory levels, or detailed product specifications on website
Focused niche (suspension and drivetrain mounts only) does not serve shops needing comprehensive parts sourcing
Website content does not indicate consumer support channels, live chat, or responsive customer service infrastructure
best_for: Independent auto repair shops seeking bulk OEM-equivalent suspension components
Automotive dealership parts departments needing reliable wholesale suppliers
Regional parts distributors and jobbers reselling to end-user repair facilities
diagnosis: Westar is a B2B automotive parts distributor serving professional repair shops and dealerships—not a consumer finance company. The current "payday-alternatives" categorization is completely inaccurate and must be corrected to "business-loans" or removed entirely, as Westar offers zero financial services, lending products, or credit solutions of any kind.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
